diff:
diff --git a/.editorconfig b/.editorconfig
index c6b74c3..eb922ec 100644
--- a/.editorconfig
+++ b/.editorconfig
@@ -17,4 +17,8 @@ indent_size = 4
 indent_size = 4
 trim_trailing_whitespace = false
 
-eclint_indent_style = unset
\ No newline at end of file
+eclint_indent_style = unset
+
+[*.yml]
+indent_style = space
+indent_size = 2
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/.github/workflows/test.yml b/.github/workflows/test.yml
index 50a3946..45b2d20 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/test.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/test.yml
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ jobs:
   unit:
     strategy:
       matrix:
-        go: ['1.20','1.21']
+        go: ['1.20','1.21','1.22','1.23']
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
       fail-fast: true
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}

exploration_log.aha_moment: The test matrix is in a single YAML array on one line; adding 1.22 and 1.23 is straightforward. The .editorconfig already has [*] with indent_size=2 but no explicit [*.yml] rule; adding one makes the YAML indentation requirement explicit.
exploration_log.hindsight: Simple config changes; no code logic involved.

alternatives: Also add latest Go stable release
key_decisions.decision: Add both 1.22 and 1.23 as specified in the task

search_sequence.reasoning: Task says to update the Go version matrix

search_sequence.result: Found existing rules but no [*.yml] section; added one with explicit 2-space indent config

minimum_sufficient_defs.name: go

minimum_sufficient_defs.name: [*.yml]
minimum_sufficient_defs.reason: edited: added new [*.yml] section for explicit 2-space indentation rule

solve_notes: Added '1.22','1.23' to the Go version array in the test matrix in .github/workflows/test.yml. Added a [*.yml] section to .editorconfig that explicitly declares indent_style=space and indent_size=2 for YAML files, consistent with the existing workflow file formatting.
task_text:
Fix .github/workflows/test.yml not testing the latest Go versions

The test workflow matrix specifies `go: ['1.20','1.21']` but newer Go
releases (1.22, 1.23) are available. The `go.mod` declares `go 1.20`
as the minimum version but the CI matrix does not verify compatibility
with current releases. Update `.github/workflows/test.yml` to add Go
1.22 and 1.23 to the test matrix. Also add `.editorconfig` rules for
`*.yml` files to enforce 2-space indentation, consistent with the
existing workflow file formatting.

thrash_preventing_defs.name: go
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: the existing matrix shows the format ['1.20','1.21'] so new versions follow the same pattern without any other syntax changes

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers both edited configuration entries. The thrash_preventing set would normally add context about how the matrix is structured, but for this simple config change it's identical to the minimum set. The only additional def is the go matrix key itself (already in minimum), confirming both tiers effectively contain the same definitions. No extra context is needed because this is a pure configuration edit with obvious format.
